mapper.select: select ga.id, ga.group_id as groupId, ga.applicant_id as applicantId, ga.application_reason as applicationReason, ga.status, ga.rejection_reason as rejectionReason, ga.created_at as createdAt, ga.processed_at as processedAt, u.nick_name as applicantNick, u.icon as applicantIcon, gc.group_name as groupName, gc.icon as groupIcon from group_applications ga left join user u on ga.applicant_id = u.id left join group_chat gc on ga.group_id = gc.id where ga.group_id = #{groupId} order by ga.created_at desc

select ga.id, ga.group_id as groupId, ga.applicant_id as applicantId, ga.application_reason as applicationReason, ga.status, ga.rejection_reason as rejectionReason, ga.created_at as createdAt, ga.processed_at as processedAt, gc.group_name as groupName, gc.icon as groupIcon from group_applications ga left join group_chat gc on ga.group_id = gc.id where ga.applicant_id = #{applicantId} order by ga.created_at desc
